'''kaludhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okwukwu|okwukwu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okwukwu|okwukwu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kaludhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kælidhith || kælidhij || kælidhish || kælidhi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || kaluludhuth || kaluludhuj || kaluludhush || kaluludhu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || kaludhuth || kaludhuj || kaludhush || kaludhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || kalufdhufth || kalufdhufj || kalufdhufsh || kalufdhuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kaludhuthu || kaludhuju || kaludhushu || kaludhuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || kaludhuth || kaludhuj || kaludhush || kaludhu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kaludhuthul || kaludhujul || kaludhushul || kaludhukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kaludhuuthuthu || kaludhuujuju || kaludhuushushu || kaludhuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || kaludhuthun || kaludhujun || kaludhushun || kaludhukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kaludhuthuoro || kaludhujuoro || kaludhushuoro || kaludhukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
